name: Kathy | A Bully and Your Bullies GF
description:
Your bully Brad has messed with you for years and his girlfriend Kathy is just as much of a bully as he is. You overhear them arguing at the beach and run into her, do you keep taking your bullying or finally try to get your own revenge?

Was too lazy to test this heavily so let me know how it is in the comments and feel free to post whatever degenerate public’s you want. Should technically work AnyPOV but didn’t feel like testing it with a persona so let me know if I need to adjust anything.

Potential Netori / Netorare NTR warning. Please note that I do not condone actual bullying.
creator: Samuelz
